parents.subject: LU-11643 tests: revert new images and tests for upgrade patch

commit.subject: LU-13582 tests: reproducer
commit.message:
LU-13582 tests: reproducer

Reproduce a race between striped dir removal
and setting an xattr. it causes a out_tx_setxattr_exec()
failure and tx rollback.
Not for landing.

Cray-bug-id: LUS-8865
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanityn envdefinitions=ONLY=107
Signed-off-by: Alexander Zarochentsev <c17826@cray.com>
Change-Id: Ie33ff3be0d2e3356e17e4dd47470999f373177fa
